orbital_targets.name: International Space Station (ISS)
orbital_targets.description: Circular low Earth orbit - rendezvous with the ISS

orbital_targets.name: Low Polar Orbit
orbital_targets.description: Low orbit with full polar coverage

orbital_targets.name: Low Equatorial Orbit
orbital_targets.description: Low equatorial orbit - ideal for constellations

orbital_targets.name: Sun-Synchronous Orbit
orbital_targets.description: Slightly retrograde polar orbit - constant solar lighting, ideal for Earth observation

orbital_targets.name: MEO Orbit (GPS)
orbital_targets.description: Circular medium Earth orbit - altitude of GPS/Galileo satellites

orbital_targets.name: Geostationary Orbit (GEO)
orbital_targets.description: Geostationary orbit - satellite fixed relative to the ground, used for telecom and weather

orbital_targets.name: Geostationary Transfer Orbit (GTO)
orbital_targets.description: Hohmann transfer ellipse to GEO - low perigee, apogee at 35,786 km

orbital_targets.name: Molniya Orbit
orbital_targets.description: Highly elliptical orbit - long dwell time over high latitudes, used by Russia

orbital_targets.name: Trans-Lunar Injection (TLI)
orbital_targets.description: Ejection trajectory toward the Moon from a LEO parking orbit

orbital_targets.name: Low Lunar Orbit (LLO)
orbital_targets.description: Low circular orbit around the Moon - typical altitude of Apollo missions
